strengths: Built and maintained distributed systems at high scale (Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second); hands-on with infrastructure, caching, real-time databases
Approximately 15 years of continuous engineering experience across multiple domains (web, mobile, backend, infrastructure); MIT graduate with strong fundamentals
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and agentic frameworks (re:cinq), showing emerging domain expertise
concerns: No demonstrated engineering leadership at scale; career is individual contributor/senior IC track (Staff Engineer) with no evidence of scaling teams from 10–30+, managing managers, or developing internal technical leadership—a hard requirement for CTO

No fintech-infrastructure background or production experience with credit systems, payment flows, working-capital management, or regulated commercial environments; Optilyz was direct-mail SaaS, and RIDE Capital role lacks fintech-specific detail

Current agentic AI involvement appears IC-level contribution to frameworks and tooling rather than designing, owning, and operating production multi-agent systems end-to-end; no evidence of feedback loops, evaluation pipelines, or production failure-mode expertise
response.justification: Bogdan is a competent full-stack engineer with 15+ years of experience and strong fundamentals; however, he does not meet the core requirements for a CTO executive role. He lacks any documented track record scaling engineering teams (a hard requirement), has no fintech-infrastructure background despite it being central to a role owning credit systems and working-capital management, and his agentic AI work appears to be IC-level framework contribution rather than end-to-end ownership of production systems. His career is a senior individual contributor trajectory, not executive leadership, with no evidence of board communication, governance frameworks, or company-wide technical strategy responsibility. The gap between his IC expertise and the executive-leadership expectations, combined with missing domain specialization in both fintech and agentic systems, makes him significantly misaligned with the role.
